rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption has no relationship to Educ. Code §39.0233, which governs special-purpose questions in end-of-course assessment instruments. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 39.0233. SPECIAL-PURPOSE QUESTIONS INCLUDED IN END-OF-COURSE ASSESSMENT INSTRUMENTS.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict detected.
